name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: major stamp catalog or numbering system.

entities.name: catalog_system
entities.brief: A published or customary numbering system (Scott, Michel, etc.).
entities.description: Reference system used for catalog numbers on individual stamps; one row per system you track.

fields.name: catalog_system_id
fields.description: Stable slug for this catalog (e.g. scott, michel, facit, sg).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Full name of the catalog or reference work.

fields.name: abbreviation
fields.description: Short label shown in UI or listings (e.g. Mi., Sc., SG).

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Edition notes, regional scope, or usage caveats.
